# Agentic Project Structure

This project uses an agentic coding workflow with GitHub Copilot and OpenCode CLI support.

## Structure

- `.github/copilot-instructions.md`: Main project context and coding standards
- `.github/agents/`: Specialized agent personas
- `.github/instructions/`: File/language-specific rules
- `.github/prompts/`: Reusable prompt templates
- `.github/skills/`: Complex workflows and skills

## How to Use

1. Review copilot-instructions.md for project context
2. Add or update agents, instructions, prompts, or skills as needed
3. Use skills for advanced workflows (see skills/README.md for details)
